testing_environment.note: Local dev server (localhost:3000) was running a DIFFERENT app ('Kernel'). All testing performed against production: https://stride-five-sigma.vercel.app

criteria_results.evidence: GET /login redirects to /workspaces when authenticated (correct auth guard behavior). Page title 'Stride — Process Mapping & Continuous Improvement' confirmed.
API /api/v1/workspaces with credentials:omit returns HTTP 401 with envelope { data: null, error: { code: 'unauthorized', message: 'Not authenticated' } }. Auth guards are working.

criteria_results.criterion: Canvas tab loads with nodes (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: Navigated to canvas tab. Rendered with 'New Section' section node and 'Regression Test Step' step node. Zoom controls and Step/Section toolbar visible.

criteria_results.criterion: Step detail panel opens on node click
criteria_results.evidence: Clicked 'Regression Test Step' node. Detail panel appeared with Name, Status (Draft/In Progress/Testing/Live/Archived), Type, Executor, Minutes, Per Month, Notes, Video, Delete Step fields.

criteria_results.criterion: Step name edit saves without error
criteria_results.evidence: Typed in step name textbox, pressed Tab to blur. 0 console errors, 0 network errors captured.

criteria_results.criterion: Section detail panel opens on node click
criteria_results.evidence: Clicked 'New Section' section node. Detail panel opened with Name, Summary, Steps (0), Notes, Delete Section fields.
Clicked Zoom In button — button became disabled at max zoom level, confirming zoom functionality is working.
No journey-type tab exists in test workspace. Clicking '+' in tab bar creates only a new workflow-type canvas tab. No UI affordance to create a journey canvas type. Cannot test journey canvas.
Navigated to /list. Page rendered 'All Steps (1)' with table showing Regression Test Step in Workflow tab, Draft status, created 3/2/2026. Search, status filter, executor filter all present.

Navigated to /gap-analysis. Page rendered the canvas application (zoom controls + Step/Section toolbar) instead of a maturity gap ranking view. Gap Analysis not in sidebar nav. Feature not deployed to production.
Navigated to /compare. Page rendered the canvas application instead of a side-by-side comparison view. Compare not in sidebar nav. Feature not deployed to production.
Navigated to /settings. Rendered with 'Workspace Settings' heading, workspace name field, Save Changes button, Danger Zone with Delete Workspace button.
Navigated to /teams. Page rendered 'Teams Canvas / Coming in Phase 1' stub without errors. Known issue per stride.md.

criteria_results.criterion: Navigate to perspectives (in settings) → list displays
criteria_results.evidence: Settings page only shows Workspace Name form and Danger Zone. No perspectives section found. scrollHeight === clientHeight (897px) — no hidden content. Perspectives management absent from production settings page.

Full button enumeration on canvas page found: All Workspaces, S (user menu), Zoom In, Zoom Out, Fit View, Step, Section only. No export button present. Export functionality not accessible in current production UI.
Same as PDF — no export button found. Export functionality not accessible in current production UI.
Playwright console_messages at error level: 0 errors, 0 warnings across full test session. Only expected 401 from intentional auth guard test.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity page: renders with filter tabs and pagination
criteria_results.evidence: Navigated to /activity. Page rendered the canvas application instead of the activity log feed. Activity link MISSING from sidebar nav. FEAT-049 not deployed to production — only on ralph/init-stride branch, not merged to main.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbooks: list view, detail view, playbook mode
criteria_results.evidence: Navigated to /runbooks. Page rendered the canvas application instead of the runbooks list. Runbooks link MISSING from sidebar nav. Feature not deployed to production.
BUILD_RESULT_2.json: typecheck.status = 'pass', errors = 0.
BUILD_RESULT_2.json: lint.status = 'pass', errors = 0. 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (addEdge unused) — pre-existing, not new.

criteria_results.criterion: API auth guards return 401 for unauthenticated requests
criteria_results.evidence: GET /api/v1/workspaces with credentials:'omit' returned HTTP 401 with body { data: null, error: { code: 'unauthorized', message: 'Not authenticated' } }. Correct envelope format confirmed.

bugs_found.description: Activity page (/activity route) renders the canvas application instead of the activity log feed. Activity link is absent from sidebar navigation. FEAT-049 activity log feature is not deployed to production — only exists on ralph/init-stride branch, not merged to main.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /w/{workspaceId}/activity. 2. Observe: canvas application renders with Step/Section toolbar, zoom controls, mini map. Expected: chronological activity feed with action type filter tabs and Load More pagination.

bugs_found.description: Runbooks page (/runbooks route) renders the canvas application instead of the runbooks list. Runbooks link is absent from sidebar navigation. Feature not deployed to production.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /w/{workspaceId}/runbooks. 2. Observe: canvas renders. Expected: runbooks list with Create Runbook button.

bugs_found.description: Gap Analysis page renders the canvas instead of the maturity gap ranking view. Gap Analysis absent from sidebar navigation.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /gap-analysis. 2. Observe: canvas renders. Expected: maturity gap ranking table.

bugs_found.description: Compare page renders the canvas instead of the side-by-side perspective comparison view. Compare absent from sidebar navigation.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /compare. 2. Observe: canvas renders. Expected: perspective selector + side-by-side canvas comparison.

bugs_found.description: Settings page missing Perspectives management section. Only Workspace Name and Danger Zone present. Per CLAUDE.md and testing routes, settings should include perspectives management and public sharing.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to /settings. 2. Observe: only Workspace Name form and Danger Zone. Expected: perspectives list and public sharing section also present.

bugs_found.description: Export functionality (PDF/PNG) is absent from canvas UI. Full button enumeration found no export-related buttons. Golden path step 11 (Export canvas as PDF) is not achievable.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to canvas tab. 2. Enumerate all buttons — only All Workspaces, user menu, Zoom In/Out/Fit View, Step, Section present. No export button found.

bugs_found.description: Sidebar navigation is missing multiple expected items: Activity, Runbooks, Comments, Dashboard, Gap Analysis, Compare. Current sidebar shows only: Workflows, List View, Teams (Soon), People (Soon), Tools (Soon), Settings, All Workspaces. Production is running a version predating Phase 3-4 features.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to any workspace page. 2. Observe sidebar. Expected: sidebar should include Activity, Runbooks, and other Phase 3-4 nav items per FEAT-049 spec.

bugs_found.description: No journey canvas tab type can be created from the UI. Clicking '+' creates a new workflow canvas immediately with no type selection. Journey canvas cannot be tested.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to canvas. 2. Click '+' tab button. 3. Observe: new workflow canvas created immediately. Expected: type selection (workflow vs journey) before creating tab.

improvements_found.observation: Fresh workspace has no onboarding prompt. User landing on empty canvas with 0 sections/0 steps has no guidance on what to do first.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add empty-state overlay or onboarding checklist for newly created workspaces on first canvas view.

improvements_found.observation: Teams/People/Tools items show 'Soon' badge but are still navigable, taking the user away from the canvas to a stub page. This interrupts workflow for no benefit.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Either disable navigation for stub items or show an inline tooltip/popover explaining upcoming features without navigating away.

root_cause_note: The majority of failures are a DEPLOYMENT GAP, not code-level regressions. Multiple Phase 3-4 features (activity log, runbooks, gap-analysis, compare, perspectives) exist only on the ralph/init-stride branch and have not been merged to main or deployed to production. The routes /activity, /runbooks, /gap-analysis, /compare all fall through to the [tabId] dynamic route (rendering the canvas) because Next.js cannot find the corresponding page.tsx files in the deployed build. All core Phase 1-2 functionality is working correctly. A production deployment of the ralph/init-stride branch is required before FEAT-049 and related features can be regression-tested.
